One-click cancel appointment — 3 prototypes

A. Instant + Undo

Side panel · Inbox item
SC
Sarah Chen ✓ Verified
DOB 03/15/1987 · Dr. Patel · Primary Care
Patient called to cancel her upcoming appointment. Mentioned she'll call back to reschedule next week.
Requested cancellation
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel
● Pending staff confirmation
Cancelling...
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel
✓ Cancelled
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel
Appointment cancelled

One click to cancel. Undo bar appears for 5 seconds as a safety net. No confirmation dialog — speed over caution. Best for high-volume clinics.

B. Inline confirm

Side panel · Inbox item
SC
Sarah Chen ✓ Verified
DOB 03/15/1987 · Dr. Patel · Primary Care
Patient called to cancel her upcoming appointment. Mentioned she'll call back to reschedule next week.
Requested cancellation
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel
● Pending staff confirmation
Cancel this appointment?
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel
✓ Cancelled
Apr 15, 2026 · 10:30 AM
Annual wellness visit · Dr. Patel

Cancellation synced to Athena. Patient will receive a confirmation text.

Two clicks but both are in the same spot. The card itself transforms into the confirmation — no modal, no context switch. Safer for clinics worried about accidental cancellations.

C. Batch actions

Side panel · Inbox item
SC
Sarah Chen ✓ Verified
DOB 03/15/1987 · Dr. Patel · Primary Care
Patient called to cancel her upcoming appointment. Asked to be notified of earlier openings for a reschedule. Also requested a prescription refill for lisinopril.
Recommended actions
Completed
✓
Appointment cancelled
Synced to Athena
✓
Confirmation sent
Text to (415) 555-0142
✓
Added to waitlist
Dr. Patel · earlier opening
○
Refill request skipped
Not selected
3 actions completed

AI pre-selects recommended actions from the call. Staff reviews, unchecks anything wrong, confirms all at once. Best when calls produce multiple follow-ups (cancel + notify + refill).
